articles.title: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 235
articles.summary: At least 4,300 people have been injured after two seven-plus magnitude shallow quakes hit seconds apart.
articles.meta_description: Rescuers search rubble for survivors as Venezuela earthquakes kill at least 235

articles.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
articles.summary: penAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of to the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.
articles.meta_description: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns

articles.title: OpenAI, Anthropic Model Tester Gray Swan Snags USD 40M
articles.summary:
Gray Swan, an AI security startup that helps frontier labs “red-team” their latest models, raises USD 40m Series A round of funding.
The post OpenAI, Anthropic Model Tester Gray Swan Snags USD 40M  appeared first on Slator.
articles.meta_description: OpenAI, Anthropic Model Tester Gray Swan Snags USD 40M

articles.title: ‘Constitutional coup’ claims as Zimbabwe senate approves extending presidential term
articles.summary:
Opposition figures fear changes will further tighten 83-year-old president Emmerson Mnangagwa’s hold on power
Zimbabwe is on the brink of amending its constitution to give the president more time in office, a change that the government says will bring stability but that opponents have labelled a “constitutional coup”.

articles.title: King Charles won't live in Buckingham Palace, reveals taxes
articles.summary: Buckingham Palace has been the British monarch's official residence in London for nearly two centuries. But royal officials say King Charles and Queen Camilla won't reside there.
articles.meta_description: King Charles won't live in Buckingham Palace, reveals taxes
